title: Redchef Ceramic Nonstick Saucepan with Lid,18cm Small Cooking Pot, Non Toxic Sauce Pans for Kitchen, Cool Handle PFAS Free Compatible with All Cooktops, Green
features: Ceramic Coating: Our small pots for cooking feature a ceramic coating that is both healthy and safety. This non-stick coating ensures food doesn’t easily stick to the bottom, making them ideal for cooking pasta, sauces, oatmeal, and more. These ceramic nonstick sauce pan are a reliable kitchen companion for a variety of dishes

Stay-Cool Handle: The ergonomic handle design of our ceramic cooking pot ensures comfort and durability. Small sauce pan stays cool to the touch while cooking, providing a safe and comfortable cooking experience. Enjoy effortless handling and optimal cooking conditions with this thoughtfully designed feature

Food Safety Cookware: Redchef cooking sauce pot is no from substances like PFAS, PFOA, lead, and cadmium. This ensures a safe and secure cooking conditions for you and your family. Enjoy delicious, healthy meals with peace of mind

Convenient to Clean: Featuring a non-stick ceramic coating, ceramic saute pan with lid makes cleaning a breeze. Grease and stains wash away effortlessly, allowing you to either rinse with water or simply wipe clean. This saves you time and eliminates the hassle of scrubbing, making kitchen cleanup quick and easy

Suitable for All Stoves: Cooking pots with lids are designed for versatility, working seamlessly with induction, glass, electric, and gas stoves. This multifunctional sauce pot adapts to any cooking environment, allowing you to cook with confidence and ease
